sections.paragraph:
verb חויל

be recruited, enlisted, drafted

verb לחיל (>>לחייל)

to draft, recruit, enlist

verb להתחיל (>>להתחייל)

be enlisted, recruited, drafted

masculine noun חיל (>>חייל)

soldier, GI, serviceman; pawn

masculine noun

corps, army, force, troop; strength, power; success

masculine noun

fear, fright; trembling
